public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as watch sergeant.
appearance: Bright-plumed road gear, polished fittings, and visible attention to presentation mark the role before the voice does.
manner: Treats routine contact like the first layer of incident response, never fully relaxing into casual talk. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a watch sergeant still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of watch sergeant in and around Market Crossroads, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Market Crossroads workable through the obligations of watch sergeant while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
hidden_pressure: Must keep visible order credible while absorbing the first shock of disorder, contraband, sabotage, or violence. Around Market Crossroads, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of watch sergeant visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Any task accepted from Tess Brokerwell may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.
Tess Brokerwell needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Market Crossroads.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Tess Brokerwell as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Market Crossroads: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response
